title: [Paupers, Vault]
description: You are standing in a secluded alcove toward the rear of the vault.  One of the lockers has been removed for you and rests open on a stone counter.

wayto.15951: ;e room = Room.current.id;fput 'go opening'; if ( room == Room.current.id ); fput 'close locker';move 'go opening'; end

tags: peer opening =~ /^Obvious exits: north, east, south$/
